_comment: M2-v2 calibration, FROZEN on 2026-06-14. The plan §7.2 documents (60, ±5) as the historical placeholder; this file is the canonical M2 source. The v1 plan's (60, ±5) was a placeholder pending M4 backtest calibration, and was refined to the values below after M2 review (2026-06-06). Bumped to M2-v2 on 2026-06-09: added a 7th cell to fill the lower-right gap (30 <= B < 70, B' < -15 -> RESOLVING). Without it, segments like power_generation_oem and data_center_shell at moderate B with strong negative momentum fell through to STABLE, which violates the hard guard's intent (the long basket should refuse them). On recalibration: bump `version`, add a `changelog` entry, and update `docs/plans/2026-06-03-bottlewatch-v1.md` §7.2 + `research/04_scoring_methodology.md` §7.6 to point here. Recalibration is only permitted using data after the recalibration date; tuning thresholds on 2024-2026 and then backtesting 2024-2026 is circular. Cell-matching convention: `b_prime_min` is inclusive (lower bound), `b_prime_max` is exclusive (upper bound) by default. For the lowest cell per side (e.g. RESOLVING_FROM_LOW's B' <= -15), set `b_prime_max_inclusive: true` to flip it. The cell order in `cells` is the order of the cells in plan §7.6 (B >= 70 first); for ties on a boundary, the first cell in the list wins.

changelog.reason: Added 7th cell (30 <= B < 70, B' <= -15 -> RESOLVING) to close the lower-right gap that previously fell through to STABLE.
Frozen calibration. No further threshold tuning on 2024-2026 data. Future recalibration requires a true hold-out period.
